case_title: PATRICK V. HARROD VS. AUTOPILOT HQ INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AUTOPILOT HQ INC.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED MAY-03-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AUTOPILOT HQ INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-08-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY STEVE WANG--ACCOUNTING MANAGE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARROD, PATRICK V. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUTOPILOT HQ INC. $2,797.84 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,887.84 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
